<a id="class-visualshadernodeoutput"></a>

# VisualShaderNodeOutput

**Inherits:** [VisualShaderNode](class_visualshadernode.md#class-visualshadernode) **<** [Resource](class_resource.md#class-resource) **<** [RefCounted](class_refcounted.md#class-refcounted) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

**Inherited By:** [VisualShaderNodeParticleOutput](class_visualshadernodeparticleoutput.md#class-visualshadernodeparticleoutput)

Represents the output shader parameters within the visual shader graph.

## Description

This visual shader node is present in all shader graphs in form of "Output" block with multiple output value ports.
